name: @tjakoen/pantry
description: PANTRY — the installable developer-docs + AI cockpit: composes BATCH+GRAIN+MILL+PROOF into one server you bunx into any project.
author: Tjakoen Stolk <tjakoen.s@gmail.com> (https://tjakoen.github.io)

scripts.deps:refresh: bun add tjakoen.github.io@github:tjakoen/tjakoen.github.io#$(git ls-remote https://github.com/tjakoen/tjakoen.github.io.git main | cut -c1-7) && bun update @tjakoen/batch @tjakoen/grain @tjakoen/mill @tjakoen/proof
